entry.title: Behavior of Smart Multi Input paste value from excel
entry.content:
Dear SAPUI5 expert, 

I recalled we could paste value from excel into Smart Multi Input with value help. However recently I checked this functionality was not supported for Smart Multi Input with Value Help. 

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.ui.comp.smartmultiinput.SmartMultiInput/sample/sap.ui.comp.sample.smartmultiinput.withoutBinding/code

Sample Data: 

Copy below values and paste in Category with Value Help from Annotations, only last value was pasted.

CAT1
CAT2
CAT3

Copy below values and paste in Category Product Value, all values was pasted. 

700001
700002
700003

Questions: Why Smart Multi Input with value help does not support paste multiple values from excel?

Regards,

Ben

SAPUI5

entry.title: Is this a bug in the UI5 Element sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton ?
entry.content:
i am using the sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton and when the user is pressing the button the barcodescanner will open as it is supposed to be. if the user press the back button of the browser / the phone the view navigates to the view before. in the browser this is ok but on the phone the user feels it would be normal to close the barcodescanner with the backbutton of the phone and  it should stay on the view where the button is. But even worse: when i navigate again to the view with the button and press it, the barcodescanner is not opening anymore and this error apperas in the console:
BarcodeScanner.scan: Barcode scanning is already in progress. -

i tried several workarounds but nothing is working. i tried to deactivate the backbutton while the barcodescanner is open, but thats not working in modern browsers anymore. My best attempt was to close the barcodescanner before leaving the view, so it could at least open again, when trying again, but i could not successfully close it. i tried with document.getElementsByClassName('closeButton')[0].click() but it was not working.

any idea?

entry.title: Change Display of Quantity Fields in specific language SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change the display of quantity fields in SAP Build Workzone for a specific language. For example, when you want to display a value of PC they will be displayed with decimal places like "1,000 PC" for one PC is available in Stock. In English language it will displayed "1 PC" without any decimal places. We also want the same display in every language.

Best regards,

Nico

entry.title: Problematic "Unnamed Object" in Fiori Elements app powered by RAP endpoint
entry.content:
Hello dear colleagues,

I have a scenario where I expose data from a table using RAP. Some fields that are part of the table key can be empty. For such fields, they look good on the OData V4 provided, they come empty as expected.

The problem is: we created a Fiori Elements app on top of this OData service, and when we look at the resulting table, all fields that should be displayed empty have the text "Unnamed Object" on them. This happens in multiple fields in multiple rows.

The columns in red are all part of the table key (and they are allowed to be empty), while the column in green is not part of the table key. So only the columns used in the table key display the unwanted "Unnamed Object" text when empty.

If you have any ideas or insights, it will be more than appreciated.

Thanks a lot!
Kind regards.

entry.title: Fiori Element - Fragment - Uncaught TypeError
entry.content:
Hi,
I have an oData V4 Service and I'm working with Fiori Elements. Into the App I want to insert an "Custom Section" (Fragment).

I have written the following coding. If the method _pf is called the program gets an Uncaught type error.

Does anybody have an idea what the problem is?

entry.title: SAPUI5 odata v4 filtering on property of associated entity
entry.content:
I am using odata v4 have to do filtering on a property in associated entity and url is as below.

Product$count=true&$expand=_ProductDescription($select=ProductDescription),_ProductPlant($select=Plant;$filter=Plant eq '1710')

Product is the entity and _ProductDescription, _ProductPlant are associated entities and filtering is required on plant which is property of _ProductPlant

I have tried as below but its not working and expecting in the format of _ProductPlant($select=Plant;$filter=Plant eq '1710'). What is the filter syntax in sapui5 code for this...

new Filter("_ProductPlant/Plant", FilterOperator.EQ, 1710))

entry.title: Any number of records from 0 to either 1k, 2k,3k....10k,20k... pass from one table to another table
entry.content:
Hi Team, We are displaying huge records from 0 to either 1k, 2k,3k....10k,20k... and so on in table. We are able to display it in sap.ui.table.Table without any issue. But the the requirement is, when user select All records at a time using select All check box and trying to get object of selected records getting error Cannot read properties of null (reading 'getObject').

When we select one by one any number of records able to get object and we are able to send selected records value from one page to another page in the table.

The problem is when user select All records then we are not getting selected all records object and value so not able send to second page.

Please suggest if we can select all records at a time and get the table value. 

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP UI5 Routing and Navigation - Detailed
entry.content:
In SAP UI5 routing, different types of brackets are used to define patterns and parameters in the routing configuration. Here are the main types and their uses:

  1. Curly Braces {}:

    • Usage: Used to define mandatory parameters in the route pattern.
    • Example: In the pattern product/{productId}, {productId} is a mandatory parameter that must be provided in the URL.
    • Purpose: Ensures that the route is only matched if the parameter is present in the URL.

  2. Colon ::

    • Usage: Used to define optional parameters in the route pattern.
    • Example: In the pattern product/:productId:, :productId: is an optional parameter that may or may not be provided in the URL.
    • Purpose: Allows the route to be matched even if the parameter is not present in the URL.

  3. Square Brackets []:

    • Usage: Used to define optional parts of the route pattern.
    • Example: In the pattern product[/:productId], /:productId is an optional part of the pattern.
    • Purpose: Allows flexibility in the URL structure, making parts of the pattern optional.

Examples

  1. Mandatory Parameter:

    {
    "pattern": "product/{productId}",
    "name": "productDetail",
    "target": "productDetail"
}
    • URL Example: #/product/123 (123 is the productId)

  2. Optional Parameter:

    {
    "pattern": "product/:productId:",
    "name": "productDetail",
    "target": "productDetail"
}
    • URL Example: #/product/123 or #/product/ (123 is the optional productId)

  3. Optional Part of the Pattern:

    {
    "pattern": "product[/:productId]",
    "name": "productDetail",
    "target": "productDetail"
}
    • URL Example: #/product/123 or #/product (123 is the optional productId)

These brackets help define the structure and flexibility of the routes in your SAP UI5 application, making it easier to handle different URL patterns and parameters.

In SAP UI5 routing, you can define routes and targets in various ways to handle different navigation scenarios. Here are some common types and configurations:

Routes

  1. Basic Route:

    • Example:
      {
    "name": "View1",
    "pattern": "",
    "target": ["TargetView1"]
}
    • Description: A simple route with no parameters, navigating to View1.

  2. Parameterized Route:

    • Example:
      {
    "name": "ProductDetail",
    "pattern": "product/{productId}",
    "target": ["TargetProductDetail"]
}
    • Description: A route with a mandatory parameter productId.

  3. Optional Parameter Route:

    • Example:
      {
    "name": "ProductDetail",
    "pattern": "product/:productId:",
    "target": ["TargetProductDetail"]
}
    • Description: A route with an optional parameter productId.

  4. Multiple Parameters Route:

    • Example:
      {
    "name": "OrderDetail",
    "pattern": "order/{orderId}/item/{itemId}",
    "target": ["TargetOrderDetail"]
}
    • Description: A route with multiple parameters orderId and itemId.

  5. Wildcard Route:

    • Example:
      {
    "name": "NotFound",
    "pattern": "*",
    "target": ["TargetNotFound"]
}
    • Description: A wildcard route that matches any URL not defined by other routes.

Targets

  1. Basic Target:

    • Example:
      {
    "TargetView1": {
        "viewName": "View1",
        "viewLevel": 1
    }
}
    • Description: A simple target pointing to View1.

  2. Target with Control:

    • Example:
      {
    "TargetView1": {
        "viewName": "View1",
        "controlId": "app",
        "controlAggregation": "pages"
    }
}
    • Description: A target specifying the control and aggregation where the view should be placed.

  3. Multiple Views Target:

    • Example:
      {
    "TargetMasterDetail": {
        "viewName": ["MasterView", "DetailView"],
        "controlId": "splitApp",
        "controlAggregation": ["masterPages", "detailPages"]
    }
}
    • Description: A target that includes multiple views, such as in a master-detail scenario.

  4. Target with Transition:

    • Example:
      {
    "TargetView1": {
        "viewName": "View1",
        "transition": "slide"
    }
}
    • Description: A target specifying a transition effect.

Example Configuration

Combining these elements, your manifest.json might look like this:

{
    "routing": {
        "config": {
            "routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
            "controlAggregation": "pages",
            "controlId": "app",
            "transition": "slide",
            "viewType": "XML",
            "viewPath": "routingandnavigation.view",
            "async": true
        },
        "routes": [
            {
                "name": "View1",
                "pattern": "",
                "target": ["TargetView1"]
            },
            {
                "name": "View2",
                "pattern": "View2",
                "target": ["TargetView2"]
            },
            {
                "name": "ProductDetail",
                "pattern": "product/{productId}",
                "target": ["TargetProductDetail"]
            }
        ],
        "targets": {
            "TargetView1": {
                "viewName": "View1",
                "controlId": "app",
                "controlAggregation": "pages"
            },
            "TargetView2": {
                "viewName": "View2",
                "controlId": "app",
                "controlAggregation": "pages"
            },
            "TargetProductDetail": {
                "viewName": "ProductDetail",
                "controlId": "app",
                "controlAggregation": "pages"
            }
        }
    }
}

This configuration demonstrates various types of routes and targets, providing flexibility in how you navigate within your SAP UI5 application.

entry.title: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent, failed to load sap/f/FlexibleColumnLayoutData.js
entry.content:
I am getting the following error when trying to run my FIORI application on the BTP launchpad.

 Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent #zfi_PptoUtilizado-Display - failed to load 'sap/f/FlexibleColumnLayoutData.js' from https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.26/resources/sap/f/FlexibleColumnLayoutData.js: 404

Here are more from the same message:

The issue is most likely caused by application com.somedomain.zfi_PptoUtilizado. Please create a support incident and assign it to the support component of the respective application. - Failed to load UI5 component with properties: '{

The strange thing is that everything works fine in my WebIDE environment

I have attached some screenshots of the error.

entry.title: Setting default date in smartfilterbar field not working
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am default value for date field in smartfilterbar which is working fine. But when I try to click on F4 searchhelp to replace the date field value, error message is shown in console which doesn't allow me to proceed further. Can someone help me to fix this issue ?

Error message is  {name: 'FormatException', message: 'Illegal sap.ui.model.odata.type.DateTime value: '}

Code that is used in filter initializing method to display default date:

Error in console:

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: E-Kanban(PK13N/PK21) set Kanban Container on full with batch number
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP kanban with replenishment strategy for external procurement and batch managed components is currently not possible.

Error message is displayed, when the kanban status was set to full that a batch number must be insert for the batch managed component. There’s no possibility to select one entry or enter the batch number at the kanban board.

Kanban control cycle is created for material XXXX. Replenishment strategy external procurement 0007- Summarized JIT calls (w/o summary). Scheduling agreement is also defined for the vendor in the sap system.

Bill of material for different components (batch / none batch managed) is defined and released in plant XXX.

Stock of this materials is provided to the vendor and can be displayed with transaction ME2O.

With the goods receipt posting (set status green in the kanban board) of the produced material, the stock of the provided components needs to be reduced.

Goods movement of the material with movement type 543 will be done automatically with the goods receipt posting for none batch managed components, but for the other ones an error message is displayed

PK13N:

Material:3918792B not batch number

When you click the container and set to full->

Error Message:

CS03

Material: 3918792B

Material 39188019 needs a batch number.

entry.title: How to make an infinity scrolling in macros table?
entry.content:
I want to make a dialog that can scrolling for load content for the table. I using sap.fe.macros.Table to make a table content in a dialog and try to put it in a ScrollContainer like the code below:

  <Dialog title="Product" id="idDialog">
    <VBox class="sapUiSmallMargin">
      <macros:FilterBar
        metaPath="@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.SelectionFields"
        id="idFilterBar"
        liveMode="true"
      />
      <ScrollContainer
        height="100%"
        width="100%"
        vertical="true"
        focusable="true">
      <macros:Table
        id="idTable"
        metaPath="products/@UI.PresentationVariant#Dialog"
        readOnly="true"
        isSearchable="true"
        enableExport="true"
        disableCopyToClipboard="true"
        enableAutoColumnWidth="true"
        headerVisible="false"
        filterBar="ActivityLogsFilterBar"
      >
      </macros:Table>
     </ScrollContainer>
    </VBox>
  </Dialog>

the output look like this:

It have the scroll bar but still have more button and only load data when click more button, I want it will load data when I scroll and not show the more button like that.

Can anyone help!

entry.title: Value help search in Smart Filterbar
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have requirement to add valuehelpsearch in the smart filterbar. I have already created custom fiori app which has smartfilterbar and smarttable which are refering some "abcentitySet" like below 

When i click on CompCode filter its not showing the search option , requirement is to search by Id and Name and get the results. So user can select 

Now my requirement is when user clicks on Compcode filter it should call diff  "xyzentityset" and display user to select. Below is the expected result

 

Can someone please throw some light on this and how can i achieve it ? 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: How can I add eventDelegate to a DatePicker control inside a fragment in a Dialog?
entry.content:
I have a Datepicker with id="lowDatePicker" inside a fragment in a dialog
In the controller, I am setting:

public onInit(): void {
const dateLowControl = this.byId("lowDatePicker");
if (dateLowControl) {
dateLowControl.addEventDelegate({
onAfterRendering: function (oEvent) {
console.log($("#" + dateLowControl.getId() + "-inner"));
$("#" + oEvent.srcControl.getId() + "-inner").prop("readonly", true);
},
});
}

But I am not getting the datePicker element. How to correctly add the eventDelegate in this case?

entry.title: smarttable sorting is not working
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have smart table where on load some data is getting populated , now i want to sort the data of the smart table without calling the backend. 

Is there any setting or property where smart table automatically does the sorting and filtering ? 

KR,

entry.title: How to bind sap.fe.macros table to data from association?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I hope this time anyone answers my question... 

I'm working on a FE app using Flexible Programming Model and OData V4. I'm trying to call a dialog upon pressing an action button on the object page. The dialog should contain a macros table with the data that comes from the root entity's association. Unfortunately, whatever I try, it doesn't display any data. Here's the working example where my dialog displays the root entity's data (which isn't what I want to achieve):

<macros:Table id="changeHistoryDialogTable"
metaPath="/BatchRelease/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem"
readOnly="true" />

 

But I want something like this:
 
<macros:Table id="changeHistoryDialogTable"
metaPath="/BatchRelease/_ChangeHistory/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem"
readOnly="true" />​
 
And it doesn't work. I tried passing contextPath, all possible combinations in the metaPath field - all in vain.
 
My Fiori version is 1.108.37 (S/4HANA On-Prem 2022)
 
I'd appreciate any suggestions.
Regrads,
Mykyta

entry.title: Filter button shortcut in SmartTable column menu - removed from latest SAPUI5 version 1.133.0
entry.content:
Hi All

Today after the UI5 version update to 1.133.0 in BTP Launchpad, We saw the 'filter' button shortcut was removed from the SmartTable column menu in our deployed apps. Only the 'Sort By' shortcut was available. Our customer thinks it is not intuitive and needs multiple clicks just to get to a simple filter operation. They would rather want the filter button back in the column menu. I checked in SAPUI5 samples and there too it is the same after we changed the version.
Is there any way I can bring back the filter button shortcut in SmartTable column? 

Thanks.

After the 1.133.0 version update 



Before version update (1.132.0)

entry.title: SAP For Me: display companies name in the list "open cases" when using the filter "Customer"
entry.content:
Hi all,

my S-User is assigned to two companies but I can only see the name of one company when using the filter "Customer" in the open cases list. The other company is only listed with the number. I'm planning to add several other companies to my S-User and this might get confusing when only the customer numbers show up. Is there a way to display the names of all companies that are assigned to my S-User?

entry.title: SAP standard library to support excel data read
entry.content:
Could you kindly confirm whether Ican use the NPM XLS library to upload and read XLS data, and if it is safe to do so in use SAP UI5 Application.


Additionally, I would appreciate it if you could suggest any alternative solutions for this task without NPM(third party API).


Thank you for your assistance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with MultiInput Not Accepting Multiple Values in SAPUI5
entry.content:
I am experiencing an issue with the sap.m.MultiInput control in my SAPUI5 application. The control is not allowing multiple values (tokens) to be entered, even though similar code works correctly in the SAPUI5 SDK.

Issue Details:
Control Used:
SAPUI5 Version: "1.108.23"

Steps to Reproduce:
Add the following MultiInput control to the XML view:

Run the application and try entering multiple values.
The control does not allow multiple values, even though the same code works in the SAPUI5 SDK.
Expected Behavior:
The MultiInput should allow multiple values (tokens) to be entered manually.

Actual Behavior:
The control behaves like a regular input field and does not tokenize multiple entries.

Additional Debugging Done:
Checked for UI version conflicts.
Verified that MultiInput is properly initialized.
Ensured there are no event conflicts in tokenUpdate.
